resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.

The only authorized first-attempt protected Raw-only Beta reached its execution step and failed before the first remote Raw commit. The private repository baseline remained unchanged, identity tmpfs cleanup passed, and the aggregate-only public log cannot identify the exact internal cause.

After the failed historical attempt, the Owner explicitly authorized controlled Stage 7 completion without artificial time or approval blockers. Delivery and serial new first-attempt dispatches are allowed; workflow rerun remains forbidden, Beta keeps zero Gmail mutation, and M3 remains gated on a real protected Beta PASS.

All eight local Stage 7 mechanisms remain available, the remote Alpha predecessor passed, and T0702 remains blocked because its protected Beta Oracle failed. Later phases, owner Recovery Key drill, protected Patch operation and final Acceptance remain unexecuted.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

A closed 19-phase public failure taxonomy, exact phase-to-reason schema coupling, operation-boundary probes and cleanup classification are locally validated and now authorized for controlled delivery. The renderer never receives exception text or protected values; the historical Beta root cause remains unknown until a new observed attempt.

Owner direction removes fixed seven-day and fourteen-day waits from Stage 7. M3 and Blue-Green can each complete in one bounded protected run when their deterministic recovery, mutation, comparison, reconciliation and single-Timeline evidence is complete; predecessor and safety gates remain fail closed.

final_acceptance_policy: No local test, workflow definition or elapsed wall-clock claim can convert a protected production Oracle to PASS.
